codeReview.summary: The fix commit correctly adds joined contact fields to GET /api/actions and validates them with API tests, resolving the original API/UI shape mismatch; however, the second prior blocking issue (required ActionsPage component-test migration to mocked useActions wiring) remains unresolved.

issues.description: The prior blocking test-coverage gap remains: this file still does not render ActionsPage or mock ../hooks/useActions to verify dismiss/snooze mutation wiring. Evidence in current file: no render( calls, no vi.mock(...) for the hook, and tests at/after line 498 focus on apiRequest call patterns rather than page-hook integration.

summary: This fix addresses only one of the two prior blockers: API join fields are now present, but the required component-test migration blocker from the original review is still open, so the fix review fails.
